title: EDINET Replay: a reproducible, provenance-preserving extraction toolkit for Japan's EDINET corporate filings
description:
EDINET Replay retrieves official filing packages from Japan's Financial Services Agency EDINET system, preserves the original source artifacts, resolves XBRL and Inline XBRL through Arelle, and exports faithful, provenance-preserving facts with traceable references back to the source filing. It targets faithful reproduction rather than financial interpretation.

This release is pre-alpha. The output contracts and reproducibility model are defined; the resolved-XBRL projection works end to end offline, and the CLI fetch command retrieves, selects, and stores real filings through the live EDINET API v2. The inline (iXBRL) presentation layer and the CLI extract command are not yet implemented. See CHANGELOG.md for the full scope and known limitations.
